title: Integrate tokenizers crate for Llama 3 BPE
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

Llama 3 uses a 128,256-vocab BPE tokenizer shipped as tokenizer.json (HuggingFace format). The existing GPT-2 tokenizer at ~/ferrotorch-gpt2/src/tokenizer.rs is byte-BPE with vocab.json+merges.txt and is not compatible.

Decision: depend on the  crate (HuggingFace's official Rust tokenizer, used by transformers' tokenizers package). It handles tokenizer.json natively including BPE merges, pre/post processors, added tokens, and template strings.

Work:
- Add  to ferrotorch-data workspace deps (or new ferrotorch-tokenize crate).
- Thin wrapper: load_tokenizer(path: &Path) -> Tokenizer, encode/decode helpers that match the ferrotorch idiom (return Vec<u32> for ids).
- Chat-template support can come later; PoC only needs encode_batch + decode for a single prompt.

Acceptance:
- Load tokenizer.json from a real Llama 3 8B download; encode('Hello world') matches Python transformers output token-for-token.
- No custom BPE implementation; we lean on the upstream crate's correctness.
